list.name: LOT 이벤트
list.rawQuery: SELECT Time AS time, Description AS text, 'LOT' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 4 AND Time >= datetime('now', '-2 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

list.name: Recipe 변경
list.rawQuery: SELECT Time AS time, Description AS text, 'Recipe' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 5 AND Time >= datetime('now', '-2 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

list.name: 시스템 이벤트
list.rawQuery: SELECT Time AS time, Description AS text, 'System' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 1 AND Time >= datetime('now', '-2 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

panels.title: 수율 + 이벤트 Annotation (알람 발생 맥락)
panels.description: 이벤트가 발생한 시점을 수율 그래프 위에 마킹. 어떤 이벤트 이후 수율이 떨어졌는지 한눈에 확인.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS yield FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTime >= datetime('now', '-2 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', StartTime) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT Time, CASE LogType WHEN 1 THEN 'System' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inspection' WHEN 4 THEN 'LOT' WHEN 5 THEN 'Recipe' ELSE CAST(LogType AS TEXT) END AS 구분, Camera AS 카메라, substr(Description, 1, 80) AS 내용 FROM histories WHERE Time >= datetime('now', '-2 hours') ORDER BY Time DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT CASE LogType WHEN 1 THEN 'System' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inspection' WHEN 4 THEN 'LOT' WHEN 5 THEN 'Recipe' ELSE CAST(LogType AS TEXT) END AS 구분, COUNT(*) AS count FROM histories WHERE Time >= datetime('now', '-2 hours') GROUP BY LogType ORDER BY count DESC
